name: pixeltable
description: Build multimodal AI applications with Pixeltable.

interface.shortDescription: Build Pixeltable apps with declarative tables, pxt CLI, RAG, agents, and serving
interface.longDescription: Use Pixeltable to build multimodal AI applications with declarative tables, computed columns, embeddings, retrieval, provider integrations, the pxt CLI (inspect, serve, deploy), and production workflow patterns.
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a Pixeltable project with uvx pixeltable-new
Build a RAG pipeline with the pixeltable skill
Debug this Pixeltable workflow with pxt errors
